CustomField.description: Will any gift items be distributed (e.g., pens, notebooks, etc.)? If so, identify the gift items to be distributed, and whether the gift items will feature a Viatris logo and/or product brand. *Please note that the provision of any gift item must adhere to the country-specific Standards for Interactions with the Healthcare Community.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
If so, identify the gift items to be distributed, and whether the gift items will feature a Viatris logo and/or product brand.
*Please note that the provision of any gift item must adhere to the country-specific Standards for Interactions with the Healthcare Community.
CustomField.label: will any gifts details
